name: Pumpkin Apple Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs, pumpkin, and oil in a large bowl.
2. Add flour, sugar, pumpkin pie spice, baking soda, and salt to the bowl with wet ingredients. Stir until just combined.
3. Fold in chopped apples until evenly distributed throughout the batter.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Grease or line muffin cups with parchment paper.
6. Pour batter into prepared muffin cups, filling each about 3/4 full.
7. Mix together streusel topping ingredients: flour, sugar, cinnamon, and softened butter until crumbly.
8. Sprinkle the streusel mixture evenly over the top of each muffin.
9. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
